name: Mousseline of Redfish Nantua
recipeInstructions:
See Sauce Nantua recipe.
Puree the fish in a food processor, scraping down the sides to ensure smooth results.
Add the egg white and blend for 30 seconds.
Add half of the ice cream and process for another 30 seconds.
Transfer this mixture to a mixing bowl over ice and beat with a wooden spoon until light.
Season with salt, pepper, nutmeg, and red pepper flakes.
Pour the prepared mixture into small individual dishes or custard cups.
Place the dishes in a pan and add water halfway up the rims.
Cook in a 350°F oven for about 15 minutes or until the mousseline is firm to the touch.
Remove from the oven, unmold, and top with Sauce Nantua.
Note: Adjust seasoning by cooking one dish first and tasting before finalizing.
